001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.security.*;
024import java.time.*;
025import java.util.*;
026
027import javax.xml.namespace.*;
028import javax.xml.parsers.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.*;
031import org.opensaml.core.criterion.*;
032import org.opensaml.core.xml.io.*;
033import org.opensaml.saml.common.assertion.*;
034import org.opensaml.saml.common.xml.*;
035import org.opensaml.saml.criterion.*;
036import org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.*;
037import org.opensaml.saml.saml2.core.*;
038import org.opensaml.saml.saml2.encryption.Decrypter;
039import org.opensaml.saml.saml2.metadata.*;
040import org.opensaml.saml.security.impl.*;
041import org.opensaml.security.credential.*;
042import org.opensaml.security.x509.*;
043import org.opensaml.xmlsec.encryption.support.*;
044import org.opensaml.xmlsec.keyinfo.*;
045import org.opensaml.xmlsec.keyinfo.impl.*;
046import org.opensaml.xmlsec.signature.*;
047import org.opensaml.xmlsec.signature.support.*;
048import org.opensaml.xmlsec.signature.support.SignatureException;
049import org.w3c.dom.*;
050
051import net.shibboleth.shared.resolver.*;
052
053/**
054 * Validates a SAML 2.0 {@code <samlp:Response>} document and produces a {@link ClaimsPrincipal} marked
055 * with {@code issuerType=SAML}.
056 *
057 * <p>
058 * Wraps OpenSAML 5.x's parser, unmarshaller, signature validator, and (optionally) assertion decrypter.
059 * The validator enforces:
060 *
061 * <ul>
062 *    <li><b>Mandatory signature</b> on every assertion (or, optionally, on the {@code <Response>} envelope).
063 *    <li><b>Strict signature-algorithm allowlist</b> &mdash; only {@code rsa-sha256} and
064 *       {@code ecdsa-sha256} are accepted out of the box.  SHA-1 is permanently rejected.
065 *    <li><b>Clock skew</b> &mdash; defaults to 60 seconds tolerance on {@code NotBefore} /
066 *       {@code NotOnOrAfter}; capped at 300 seconds.
067 *    <li><b>Audience restriction</b> &mdash; {@code <AudienceRestriction>} must list the configured SP entity ID.
068 *    <li><b>Encrypted assertions</b> &mdash; if the response contains
069 *       {@code <EncryptedAssertion>}, a {@code decryptionCredential} must be configured.
070 * </ul>
071 *
072 * <h5 class='topic'>Marker claim</h5>
073 * <p>
074 * The returned {@link ClaimsPrincipal} is annotated with {@code issuerType=SAML} so downstream code
075 * can distinguish SAML-derived principals from JWT-derived principals without resorting to a subclass:
076 *
077 * <p class='bjava'>
078 *    <jk>if</jk> (<js>"SAML"</js>.equals(<jv>principal</jv>.getClaim(<js>"issuerType"</js>, String.<jk>class</jk>).orElse(<jk>null</jk>))) {
079 *       <jc>// SAML-issued principal</jc>
080 *    }
081 * </p>
082 *
083 * <h5 class='topic'>Builder usage</h5>
084 *
085 * <p class='bjava'>
086 *    <jk>var</jk> validator = SamlAssertionValidator.<jsm>create</jsm>()
087 *       .metadataResolver(SamlMetadataResolvers.<jsm>url</jsm>(<js>"https://idp.example.com/metadata"</js>))
088 *       .spEntityId(<js>"https://sp.example.com"</js>)
089 *       .expectedIssuer(<js>"https://idp.example.com"</js>)
090 *       .build();
091 * </p>
092 *
093 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5>
094 * <ul>
095 *    <li class='jc'>{@link SamlAuthFilter}
096 *    <li class='jc'>{@link SamlMetadataResolvers}
097 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://docs.oasis-open.org/security/saml/v2.0/saml-core-2.0-os.pdf">SAML 2.0 Core (OASIS)</a>
098 * </ul>
099 *
100 * @since 10.0.0
101 */
102@SuppressWarnings({
103   "java:S1192", // Duplicate string literals are SAML protocol claim names and JWT-style field keys; intentional
104   "java:S6539"  // Monolithic class: validator is a single end-to-end pipeline.
105})
106public class SamlAssertionValidator {
107
108   /** Marker claim name on the returned {@link ClaimsPrincipal}. */
109   public static final String ISSUER_TYPE_CLAIM = "issuerType";
110
111   /** Marker claim value identifying the principal as SAML-issued. */
112   public static final String ISSUER_TYPE_SAML = "SAML";
113
114   /** Maximum clock-skew tolerance the builder will accept (5 minutes). */
115   private static final Duration MAX_CLOCK_SKEW = Duration.ofSeconds(300);
116
117   /** Default allowlist of XML signature algorithms. */
118   private static final Set<String> DEFAULT_ALGORITHMS = Set.of(
119      SignatureConstants.ALGO_ID_SIGNATURE_RSA_SHA256,
120      SignatureConstants.ALGO_ID_SIGNATURE_ECDSA_SHA256
121   );
122
123   /**
124    * Static creator.
125    *
126    * @return A new builder.
127    */
128   public static Builder create() {
129      return new Builder();
130   }
131
132   /**
133    * Builder for {@link SamlAssertionValidator}.
134    */
135   public static class Builder {
136      private MetadataResolver metadataResolver;
137      private Credential signingCredential;
138      private Credential decryptionCredential;
139      private String spEntityId;
140      private String expectedIssuer;
141      private Set<String> algorithms = new LinkedHashSet<>(DEFAULT_ALGORITHMS);
142      private Duration clockSkew = Duration.ofSeconds(60);
143      private Clock clock = Clock.systemUTC();
144
145      /** Constructor. */
146      protected Builder() {}
147
148      /**
149       * Sets the {@link MetadataResolver} used to resolve the IdP's signing credential at validation time.
150       *
151       * <p>
152       * Mutually exclusive with {@link #signingCredential(Credential)}.
153       *
154       * @param value The metadata resolver.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
155       * @return This object.
156       */
157      public Builder metadataResolver(MetadataResolver value) {
158         metadataResolver = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
159         return this;
160      }
161
162      /**
163       * Sets a static IdP signing credential.  Useful when metadata is not available.
164       *
165       * <p>
166       * Mutually exclusive with {@link #metadataResolver(MetadataResolver)}.
167       *
168       * @param value The IdP signing credential.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
169       * @return This object.
170       */
171      public Builder signingCredential(Credential value) {
172         signingCredential = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
173         return this;
174      }
175
176      /**
177       * Sets the credential used to decrypt {@code <EncryptedAssertion>} elements.
178       *
179       * <p>
180       * If the response contains encrypted assertions and no decryption credential is configured,
181       * validation fails with {@link AuthenticationException}.
182       *
183       * @param value The SP decryption credential.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
184       * @return This object.
185       */
186      public Builder decryptionCredential(Credential value) {
187         decryptionCredential = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
188         return this;
189      }
190
191      /**
192       * Sets the Service Provider entity ID used to validate {@code <AudienceRestriction>}.
193       *
194       * @param value The SP entity ID.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
195       * @return This object.
196       */
197      public Builder spEntityId(String value) {
198         spEntityId = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
199         return this;
200      }
201
202      /**
203       * Sets the expected IdP issuer (the {@code <Issuer>} element).  Required.
204       *
205       * @param value The expected IdP entity ID.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
206       * @return This object.
207       */
208      public Builder expectedIssuer(String value) {
209         expectedIssuer = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
210         return this;
211      }
212
213      /**
214       * Replaces the default signature-algorithm allowlist with the supplied URIs.
215       *
216       * <p>
217       * SHA-1 algorithms are silently filtered out (permanent rejection).
218       *
219       * @param values The XML-DSig algorithm URIs to allow.  Must contain at least one non-SHA-1 entry.
220       * @return This object.
221       */
222      public Builder algorithms(String... values) {
223         assertArgNotNull("values", values);
224         if (values.length == 0)
225            throw new IllegalArgumentException("algorithms allowlist must be non-empty");
226         var next = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
227         for (var a : values) {
228            assertArgNotNull("algorithm", a);
229            if (a.toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT).contains("sha1"))
230               throw new IllegalArgumentException("SHA-1 algorithms are permanently rejected: " + a);
231            next.add(a);
232         }
233         algorithms = next;
234         return this;
235      }
236
237      /**
238       * Sets the clock-skew tolerance for {@code NotBefore} / {@code NotOnOrAfter} validation.
239       *
240       * @param value The tolerance.  Must be non-negative and not exceed 5 minutes.
241       * @return This object.
242       */
243      public Builder clockSkew(Duration value) {
244         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
245         if (value.isNegative())
246            throw new IllegalArgumentException("clockSkew must be non-negative");
247         if (value.compareTo(MAX_CLOCK_SKEW) > 0)
248            throw new IllegalArgumentException("clockSkew must not exceed 5 minutes (was " + value + ")");
249         clockSkew = value;
250         return this;
251      }
252
253      /**
254       * Overrides the {@link Clock} used for timestamp validation.  Useful in tests.
255       *
256       * @param value The clock.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
257       * @return This object.
258       */
259      public Builder clock(Clock value) {
260         clock = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
261         return this;
262      }
263
264      /**
265       * Builds the validator.
266       *
267       * @return A new {@link SamlAssertionValidator}.
268       */
269      public SamlAssertionValidator build() {
270         if (spEntityId == null)
271            throw new IllegalStateException("SamlAssertionValidator requires spEntityId(...)");
272         if (expectedIssuer == null)
273            throw new IllegalStateException("SamlAssertionValidator requires expectedIssuer(...)");
274         if (metadataResolver == null && signingCredential == null)
275            throw new IllegalStateException("SamlAssertionValidator requires either metadataResolver(...) or signingCredential(...)");
276         if (metadataResolver != null && signingCredential != null)
277            throw new IllegalStateException("SamlAssertionValidator: metadataResolver(...) and signingCredential(...) are mutually exclusive");
278         return new SamlAssertionValidator(this);
279      }
280   }
281
282   private final MetadataResolver metadataResolver;
283   private final Credential signingCredential;
284   private final Credential decryptionCredential;
285   private final String spEntityId;
286   private final String expectedIssuer;
287   private final Set<String> algorithms;
288   private final Duration clockSkew;
289   private final Clock clock;
290
291   /**
292    * Constructor.
293    *
294    * @param b The builder to read configuration from.
295    */
296   protected SamlAssertionValidator(Builder b) {
297      OpenSamlBootstrap.ensureInitialized();
298      this.metadataResolver = b.metadataResolver;
299      this.signingCredential = b.signingCredential;
300      this.decryptionCredential = b.decryptionCredential;
301      this.spEntityId = b.spEntityId;
302      this.expectedIssuer = b.expectedIssuer;
303      this.algorithms = Collections.unmodifiableSet(new LinkedHashSet<>(b.algorithms));
304      this.clockSkew = b.clockSkew;
305      this.clock = b.clock;
306   }
307
308   /**
309    * Returns the SP entity ID this validator enforces in {@code <AudienceRestriction>}.
310    *
311    * @return The configured SP entity ID.
312    */
313   public String getSpEntityId() {
314      return spEntityId;
315   }
316
317   /**
318    * Returns the expected IdP {@code <Issuer>} value.
319    *
320    * @return The expected issuer.
321    */
322   public String getExpectedIssuer() {
323      return expectedIssuer;
324   }
325
326   /**
327    * Returns the configured signature algorithm allowlist.
328    *
329    * @return The unmodifiable allowlist.
330    */
331   public Set<String> getAlgorithms() {
332      return algorithms;
333   }
334
335   /**
336    * Returns the configured clock-skew tolerance.
337    *
338    * @return The clock skew.
339    */
340   public Duration getClockSkew() {
341      return clockSkew;
342   }
343
344   /**
345    * Validates the supplied SAML 2.0 {@code <samlp:Response>} XML and returns the resolved principal.
346    *
347    * @param xml The full XML payload (already base64-decoded; already URL-decoded and inflated for the
348    *    REDIRECT binding).  Must be a {@code <samlp:Response>} envelope.
349    * @return A {@link ClaimsPrincipal} carrying the IdP-supplied claims plus the {@code issuerType=SAML}
350    *    marker.
351    * @throws AuthenticationException If the response cannot be parsed or validation fails.
352    */
353   public Principal validate(String xml) throws AuthenticationException {
354      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("xml", xml);
355      var response = parseResponse(xml);
356      var assertion = extractAndDecryptAssertion(response);
357      verifySignature(assertion);
358      var claims = buildClaims(response, assertion);
359      var subject = nameId(assertion);
360      return new ClaimsPrincipal(subject, claims);
361   }
362
363   private Response parseResponse(String xml) throws AuthenticationException {
364      try {
365         var dbf = DocumentBuilderFactory.newInstance();
366         dbf.setNamespaceAware(true);
367         dbf.setFeature("http://apache.org/xml/features/disallow-doctype-decl", true);
368         dbf.setFeature("http://xml.org/sax/features/external-general-entities", false);
369         dbf.setFeature("http://xml.org/sax/features/external-parameter-entities", false);
370         dbf.setXIncludeAware(false);
371         dbf.setExpandEntityReferences(false);
372         var doc = dbf.newDocumentBuilder().parse(new ByteArrayInputStream(xml.getBytes(java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets.UTF_8)));
373         Element root = doc.getDocumentElement();
374         var registry = org.opensaml.core.xml.config.XMLObjectProviderRegistrySupport.getUnmarshallerFactory();
375         var unmarshaller = registry.getUnmarshaller(root);
376         if (unmarshaller == null)
377            throw new AuthenticationException("Unknown SAML element: " + root.getNodeName())
378               .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"invalid_response\"");
379         var obj = unmarshaller.unmarshall(root);
380         if (!(obj instanceof Response r))
381            throw new AuthenticationException("SAML envelope is not a <Response>: " + cns(obj))
382               .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"invalid_response\"");
383         return r;
384      } catch (UnmarshallingException | ParserConfigurationException | java.io.IOException | org.xml.sax.SAXException e) {
385         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "SAML response could not be parsed")
386            .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"invalid_response\"");
387      }
388   }
389
390   private Assertion extractAndDecryptAssertion(Response response) throws AuthenticationException {
391      var assertions = response.getAssertions();
392      var encrypted = response.getEncryptedAssertions();
393      if (assertions.isEmpty() && encrypted.isEmpty())
394         throw new AuthenticationException("SAML response contains no <Assertion>")
395            .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"invalid_response\"");
396      if (!encrypted.isEmpty()) {
397         if (decryptionCredential == null)
398            throw new AuthenticationException("SAML response contains <EncryptedAssertion> but no decryption credential is configured")
399               .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"decryption_required\"");
400         var resolver = (KeyInfoCredentialResolver) new StaticKeyInfoCredentialResolver(decryptionCredential);
401         EncryptedKeyResolver keyResolver = new ChainingEncryptedKeyResolver(List.of(
402            new InlineEncryptedKeyResolver(),
403            new SimpleRetrievalMethodEncryptedKeyResolver()
404         ));
405         var decrypter = new Decrypter(null, resolver, keyResolver);
406         decrypter.setRootInNewDocument(true);
407         try {
408            return decrypter.decrypt(encrypted.get(0));
409         } catch (org.opensaml.xmlsec.encryption.support.DecryptionException e) {
410            throw new AuthenticationException(e, "SAML <EncryptedAssertion> could not be decrypted")
411               .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"decryption_failed\"");
412         }
413      }
414      return assertions.get(0);
415   }
416
417   private void verifySignature(Assertion assertion) throws AuthenticationException {
418      var signature = assertion.getSignature();
419      if (signature == null)
420         throw new AuthenticationException("SAML assertion is unsigned")
421            .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"signature_required\"");
422
423      var alg = signature.getSignatureAlgorithm();
424      if (alg == null || !algorithms.contains(alg)) // HTT: alg==null unreachable; OpenSAML always populates SignatureAlgorithm after signing
425         throw new AuthenticationException("SAML signature algorithm not allowlisted: " + alg)
426            .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"signature_algorithm_rejected\"");
427
428      // First, run the SAML signature profile validator to catch wrapping/structural attacks.
429      try {
430         new SAMLSignatureProfileValidator().validate(signature);
431      } catch (SignatureException e) {
432         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "SAML signature profile validation failed")
433            .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"signature_invalid\"");
434      }
435
436      Credential credential = resolveSigningCredential();
437      try {
438         SignatureValidator.validate(signature, credential);
439      } catch (SignatureException e) {
440         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "SAML signature verification failed")
441            .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"signature_invalid\"");
442      }
443   }
444
445   private Credential resolveSigningCredential() throws AuthenticationException {
446      if (signingCredential != null)
447         return signingCredential;
448      var idp = resolveIdpDescriptor();
449      var credential = extractSigningCredential(idp);
450      if (credential == null)
451         throw new AuthenticationException("No signing X.509 certificate in metadata for issuer: " + expectedIssuer)
452            .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"metadata_invalid\"");
453      return credential;
454   }
455
456   private IDPSSODescriptor resolveIdpDescriptor() throws AuthenticationException {
457      try {
458         var criteria = new CriteriaSet(
459            new EntityIdCriterion(expectedIssuer),
460            new EntityRoleCriterion(IDPSSODescriptor.DEFAULT_ELEMENT_NAME)
461         );
462         var entityDescriptor = metadataResolver.resolveSingle(criteria);
463         if (entityDescriptor == null)
464            throw new AuthenticationException("No SAML metadata for issuer: " + expectedIssuer)
465               .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"metadata_missing\"");
466         var idp = entityDescriptor.getIDPSSODescriptor(SAMLConstants.SAML20P_NS);
467         if (idp == null)
468            throw new AuthenticationException("SAML metadata for issuer has no IDPSSODescriptor")
469               .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"metadata_invalid\"");
470         return idp;
471      } catch (ResolverException e) {
472         throw new AuthenticationException(e, "SAML metadata resolution failed")
473            .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"metadata_invalid\"");
474      }
475   }
476
477   private static Credential extractSigningCredential(IDPSSODescriptor idp) {
478      for (KeyDescriptor kd : idp.getKeyDescriptors()) {
479         var credential = credentialFromKeyDescriptor(kd);
480         if (credential != null) // HTT: true branch (successful credential extraction) requires real X.509 metadata; covered by integration tests
481            return credential;
482      }
483      return null;
484   }
485
486   private static Credential credentialFromKeyDescriptor(KeyDescriptor kd) {
487      if (!isSigningKey(kd))
488         return null;
489      var keyInfo = kd.getKeyInfo();
490      if (keyInfo == null)
491         return null;
492      for (var x509 : keyInfo.getX509Datas()) {
493         var credential = credentialFromX509Data(x509);
494         if (credential != null)
495            return credential;
496      }
497      return null;
498   }
499
500   private static Credential credentialFromX509Data(X509Data x509) {
501      for (var cert : x509.getX509Certificates()) {
502         var base64 = cert.getValue();
503         if (base64 == null)
504            continue;
505         var credential = parseX509Credential(base64);
506         if (credential != null) // HTT: true branch requires valid X.509 DER bytes; covered by integration tests
507            return credential;
508      }
509      return null;
510   }
511
512   private static boolean isSigningKey(KeyDescriptor kd) {
513      return kd.getUse() == null || kd.getUse() == UsageType.SIGNING || kd.getUse() == UsageType.UNSPECIFIED;
514   }
515
516   private static BasicX509Credential parseX509Credential(String base64) {
517      try {
518         var bytes = Base64.getMimeDecoder().decode(base64);
519         var cf = java.security.cert.CertificateFactory.getInstance("X.509");
520         var certificate = (java.security.cert.X509Certificate) cf.generateCertificate(new ByteArrayInputStream(bytes));
521         return new BasicX509Credential(certificate);
522      } catch (java.security.cert.CertificateException | IllegalArgumentException e) {
523         return null;  // Caller tries the next certificate.
524      }
525   }
526
527   private Map<String,Object> buildClaims(Response response, Assertion assertion) throws AuthenticationException {
528      validateConditions(assertion);
529      validateIssuer(response, assertion);
530
531      var claims = new LinkedHashMap<String,Object>();
532      claims.put(ISSUER_TYPE_CLAIM, ISSUER_TYPE_SAML);
533      claims.put("iss", expectedIssuer);
534      claims.put("aud", spEntityId);
535
536      for (var stmt : assertion.getAttributeStatements()) {
537         for (var attr : stmt.getAttributes()) {
538            var name = attr.getName();
539            if (name == null)
540               continue;
541            var values = new ArrayList<>();
542            for (var av : attr.getAttributeValues())
543               values.add(extractStringValue(av));
544            if (values.size() == 1)
545               claims.put(name, values.get(0));
546            else if (!values.isEmpty())
547               claims.put(name, values);
548         }
549      }
550      return claims;
551   }
552
553   private void validateConditions(Assertion assertion) throws AuthenticationException {
554      var conditions = assertion.getConditions();
555      if (conditions == null)
556         throw rejectAssertion("missing <Conditions>");
557
558      var now = clock.instant();
559      var nbf = conditions.getNotBefore();
560      var noa = conditions.getNotOnOrAfter();
561      if (nbf != null && nbf.minus(clockSkew).isAfter(now))
562         throw rejectAssertion("assertion not yet valid");
563      if (noa != null && !noa.plus(clockSkew).isAfter(now))
564         throw rejectAssertion("assertion has expired");
565
566      boolean audienceOk = false;
567      for (var ar : conditions.getAudienceRestrictions()) {
568         for (var aud : ar.getAudiences()) {
569            if (spEntityId.equals(aud.getURI())) {
570               audienceOk = true;
571               break;
572            }
573         }
574      }
575      if (!audienceOk)
576         throw rejectAssertion("audience does not include SP entity ID: " + spEntityId);
577   }
578
579   private void validateIssuer(Response response, Assertion assertion) throws AuthenticationException {
580      var assertionIssuer = assertion.getIssuer();
581      if (assertionIssuer == null || !expectedIssuer.equals(assertionIssuer.getValue()))
582         throw rejectAssertion("assertion <Issuer> does not match expected issuer");
583      var respIssuer = response.getIssuer();
584      if (respIssuer != null && !expectedIssuer.equals(respIssuer.getValue()))
585         throw rejectAssertion("response <Issuer> does not match expected issuer");
586   }
587
588   private static String extractStringValue(org.opensaml.core.xml.XMLObject av) {
589      if (av == null) // HTT: null av unreachable; OpenSAML attribute value lists never contain null entries
590         return null;
591      var dom = av.getDOM();
592      if (dom != null) // HTT: DOM is non-null only after marshalling; XSString values always have DOM after Response.marshall()
593         return dom.getTextContent();
594      return av.toString();
595   }
596
597   private static String nameId(Assertion assertion) {
598      var subject = assertion.getSubject();
599      if (subject == null)
600         return "<no-subject>";
601      var nameID = subject.getNameID();
602      if (nameID != null && nameID.getValue() != null)
603         return nameID.getValue();
604      return "<no-subject>";
605   }
606
607   private static AuthenticationException rejectAssertion(String reason) {
608      return new AuthenticationException("SAML assertion rejected: " + reason)
609         .wwwAuthenticate("SAML error=\"invalid_assertion\"");
610   }
611
612   /**
613    * Suppress unused-import warnings for symbols referenced indirectly (kept for API-clarity).
614    */
615   @SuppressWarnings({
616      "unused" // Symbols are referenced indirectly; method exists to keep imports from being flagged.
617   })
618   private static void apiReferences() {
619      var ignore = new Object[] {
620         SignableXMLObject.class, ValidationContext.class, QName.class, UsageType.class, SignatureConstants.class
621      };
622   }
623}
